query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS automation_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  automationId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  isActive TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  lastRunAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalRuns INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalSuccess INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalErrors INT DEFAULT 0,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO automation_settings (automationId, isActive) VALUES
  ('welcome_whatsapp', 1),
  ('follow_up_48h', 1),
  ('contract_signed_chain', 1),
  ('renewal_30d', 1),
  ('overdue_invoice', 1),
  ('onboarding_post_payment', 1),
  ('nps_post_project', 1),
  ('reengagement_7d', 1),
  ('session_reminder_24h', 1),
  ('weekly_pipeline_summary', 1);
